text: 571 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّهُ يَكْتُبُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ لَهُ بِعَدَدِ كُلِّ شَعْرَةٍ مَرَّتْ عَلَيْهَا يَدُهُ حَسَنَةً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.571 - It is reported: "Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, writes for the person, for every strand of hair that their hand passes over (on the head of the orphan), a good deed."
